creator: freebsd@crontab.pw
text:
In the manpage for rsync(1), under the SYNOPSIS heading there is a link to the online version of the manpage. At the end of the URL, there is a dot (.) appended to the url.

While reading the FreeBSD manpage (https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=rsync&sektion=1) if you click on the link with the appended dot in the manpage, users will be forwarded to a Site Not Found error.

To correct this, the trailing dot would need to be removed and the URL will forward users to the correct online manpage
